---
title: "Quantifying metacognitive performance with the `hmetad` package in `R`"
---


This website contains materials for a workshop on measures and Bayesian models of metacognition. 

Please use the following links to access the workshop materials:

## [Tutorial](tutorial/index.html)
This is the main tutorial worksheet, which focuses on the need for performance-independent measures of metacognition, the meta-$d'$ model, and the benefits of hierarchical Bayesian estimation.

## [Slides](slides/index.html){target="_blank"}
These are the accompanying slides, which describe other measures of metacognition in more detail.
